article_title: Mediator 与 Observer 模式对比：C# 中如何选对对象通信方式
core_theme: Mediator 集中协调 vs Observer 广播通知 —— 两种对象通信模式的本质区别与选择依据
reader_takeaway: 读完能判断在什么场景下该用集中协调（Mediator），什么场景下该用广播通知（Observer）
summary_angle: 两种模式的核心差异：一个主动路由、一个被动广播，匹配错误会让设计越来越别扭

information_blocks.source_anchor: Mediator 模式章节：中心协调器管理参与者之间的通信，主动路由消息
information_blocks.visual_idea: 画面左侧，一个中心枢纽节点通过定向箭头连接多个参与者节点，代表集中协调

information_blocks.source_anchor: Observer 模式章节：Subject 向所有订阅者广播通知，订阅者独立响应
information_blocks.visual_idea: 画面右侧，一个广播源向四周辐射信号波，多个接收端各自独立接收

information_blocks.source_anchor: 总结章节：需要管理型通信选 Mediator，需要独立广播选 Observer
information_blocks.visual_idea: 画面中间偏下的分界/选择指示，连接左右两侧的对比

main_metaphor: 交通管制员 vs 气象广播站 —— 一个做定向路由，一个做全方位广播
primary_subject: 一个中心控制枢纽（左侧）与一个广播信号塔（右侧）在宽阔画面中形成左右对照
subject_action: 左侧的枢纽通过明确方向箭头向各节点发送信号；右侧的广播塔向外扩散圆形信号波
composition: 左右对照，中间用一条微妙的光影分界线或决策标记分隔两种范式
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: high-contrast cinematic illustration, strong key light, deep shadows, wide-screen composition, dramatic but realistic color grading
selected_style_reason: 用户未指定风格，本篇从 40 项风格池随机选中；比较型文章适合用高对比和光影来强化两种范式的对立与选择
style_safety_note: 清单风格为泛类型描述，不涉及品牌、工作室或艺术家复刻
draft_goal: 第一轮验证左侧集中协调与右侧广播通知的对照构图是否成立，以及电影级光影是否强化了对比关系
revision_targets: 如果两侧视觉力度不均衡，调整光比和饱和度
如果广播侧信号波像 HUD 而不是概念图，收紧 style 描述
如果信息块标签太小或太密，缩小到 3 个标签并加大间距
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide cinematic infographic-story cover illustration that summarizes the article. Theme: Mediator centralized coordination vs Observer broadcast notification — two fundamentally different approaches to object communication in C#. The reader should quickly feel the sharp contrast between managed routing and passive broadcasting, and know when to pick each.

Summary angle: One is active routing through a central hub, the other is passive broadcast to all listeners. Picking the wrong one makes your design fight against you.
Narrative flow: conflict-to-resolution. In a 2.35:1 frame, keep one dominant focal subject and 2-4 supporting narrative beats. Each beat must map to the article's information blocks rather than generic decoration.
Information blocks:
- contrast: Mediator central hub with directed arrows connecting participant nodes, representing active coordination and selective routing. Label: "Mediator", number: ①
- contrast: Observer broadcast source radiating signal waves outward to independent receivers on the right side, representing one-to-many notification. Label: "Observer", number: ②
- takeaway: a subtle dividing decision indicator between left and right sides, showing the choice between two paradigms. Label: "选对通信方式"

Main metaphor: air traffic controller tower (left, directed routing) vs weather broadcast station (right, omnidirectional broadcast).
Subject: a central control hub with directional signal paths on the left, contrasted with a broadcast tower radiating concentric waves on the right, connected by a cinematic middle ground.
Composition/framing: left-right contrast with a subtle light-shadow dividing line in the center. Prefer horizontal storytelling that stays legible in a wide cover.
Style/medium: combine conceptual editorial illustration with the selected visual style descriptor: high-contrast cinematic illustration, strong key light, deep shadows, wide-screen composition, dramatic but realistic color grading. Stylized, polished, editorial, visually strong, and clearly readable as an infographic-style summary cover. Do not imitate a specific brand, studio, or living artist.
Color palette: deep navy indigo on the left side transitioning to warm amber gold on the right side, with silver white accents and highlights.
Visible text policy: allow only 1-3 short Chinese labels or number chips by default, and no more than 4 when strictly necessary, all sourced from the information blocks. Each label <= 6 Chinese characters or one required product/model name. No poster title, no long sentences, no English slogans, no fake UI labels, no fake chart axes, no fake architecture node names.
Constraints: no watermark, no prompt residue, no screenshots, no dashboards, no fake diagrams, no fake charts, no fake terminal output, no fabricated metrics, no unrelated icon collage, no decorative clutter.
Avoid: fake UI, fake dashboard, fake terminal, code screenshots, generic robot, neon cityscape, cyberpunk purple-blue haze, floating chips, HUD overlays.
